behavior_summary: U8P_TORCH::TORCH::look handles the player's examination of a torch: it prepares process/item info state and always displays the short description string "torch  " to the viewer via Item::bark.

U8P_TORCH::TORCH::use implements the "use object" behavior for the torch: it asks the current process for a target, validates reachability, enforces several target-type/frame/status constraints, and if all checks pass triggers an effect at the target's coordinates by invoking FREE::2411 with the target reference.
If no target is chosen the use action aborts immediately; if the chosen target is not reachable the torch barks "can't reach " and the use aborts.

Type (0x018B), frame (0x13), and a cleared status bit (0x08) are required on the target for the use action to proceed — these specific constants' meanings are inferred from comparisons and treated as eligibility checks.
notable_control_flow: U8P_TORCH::TORCH::look: straightforward linear handler — set info/exclude, call Item::bark("torch  "), then suspend/return (no branching).

U8P_TORCH::TORCH::use: target selection -> if target==0 then return; else call Item::canReach(flag=0x01,target) -> if not reachable then Item::bark("can't reach ") and return; else perform type/frame/status checks -> if any fail return; else gather Z,Y,X and call FREE::2411(x,y,z,0,0x010B,target).
open_questions: Exact semantic meaning of the type constant 0x018B (what in-game object/class it denotes).
Exact meaning of frame value 0x13 and why that frame is required for the torch use.
Precise semantics of the status bit 0x08 (what it represents when set/clear).
Concrete effect performed by FREE::2411 (inferred to be the torch-on-target effect, but library semantics are unknown).
Details of the 'set info / process exclude' operations invoked on U8P_TORCH::look (what info id is set and why the exclusion is needed).

main_function.name: U8P_TORCH::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the examine/U8P_TORCH::look response for the torch: set up process/item info state and display the short description to the viewing process.
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_TORCH::look) — invoked when the player or actor looks at/inspects the torch (area/inspect trigger).

function_map.name: U8P_TORCH::look
function_map.role: Examine/U8P_TORCH::look handler that displays the torch description to the player.

function_map.name: U8P_TORCH::use
function_map.role: Use-on-target handler: select target, validate, and trigger an effect at the target when eligible.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine/item routine used to display short messages or descriptions to a process/player.

function_map.name: U8P_TORCH::process target()
function_map.role: Runtime/process helper that requests/returns a target selection for the current action (returns 0 if none).

function_map.name: Item::canReach
function_map.role: Reachability test used to verify whether the actor/process can reach the selected target.

function_map.name: Item::getType
function_map.role: Returns the target item's type id used for eligibility checks.

function_map.name: Item::getFrame
function_map.role: Returns the target item's frame/state index used for eligibility checks.

function_map.name: Item::getStatus
function_map.role: Returns the target item's status bits consulted during eligibility checks.

function_map.name: Item::getZ
function_map.role: Returns the target's Z coordinate used when invoking the effect.

function_map.name: Item::getY
function_map.role: Returns the target's Y coordinate used when invoking the effect.

function_map.name: Item::getX
function_map.role: Returns the target's X coordinate used when invoking the effect.

function_map.name: FREE::2411
function_map.role: Library/free routine invoked with target coords and reference; inferred to perform the torch-on-target effect or trigger an effect at that location.

external_calls.purpose: Display the torch's short description string to the viewing process.
Request the current process to select a target for the use action; return 0 if none selected.
Check whether the actor/process can reach the selected target (called with flag 0x01); failure leads to a "can't reach" message and abort.
On failed reachability, inform the player with "can't reach ".
Retrieve the target's type id and compare to constant 0x018B as part of the eligibility checks.
Retrieve the target's frame and compare to 0x13 as part of the eligibility checks.
Read target status bits and ensure bit 0x08 is clear before proceeding.
Fetch Z coordinate for passing to FREE::2411 when triggering the effect.
Fetch Y coordinate for passing to FREE::2411 when triggering the effect.
Fetch X coordinate for passing to FREE::2411 when triggering the effect.
Invoke the library routine with (x,y,z,0,0x010B,target) to trigger the torch's effect at the target location (inferred).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_TORCH::TORCH::look handles the player's examination of a torch: it prepares process/item info state and always displays the short description string "torch  " to the viewer via Item::bark.
